item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson, civil rights leader and former presidential candidate, dies at 84
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson was a civil rights icon, Baptist minister and two-time Democratic presidential candidate.

item.title: Europe has 'failed' in the face of Trump and Putin's ‘wrecking ball’ politics, top security official says
item.description: The head of Europe’s biggest security forum said regional powers were “totally on the sidelines” of major discussions — but that it was their “own fau...

item.title: Hyatt Chairman Pritzker leaves board over Epstein ties
item.description: The 75-year-old billionaire heir said he would not seek reelection to the board at the annual stockholder meeting.

item.title: Epstein files fallout: The high-profile people burned by past dealings with a predator
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein killed himself in a New York City federal jail in 2019. But more than six years later, people are still losing their jobs because of h...

item.title: What's next for Cuba? Trump turns the screws as the island runs out of jet fuel
item.description: Cuba’s government appears to be on the brink of economic collapse amid a worsening energy crisis.
